channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Sonos Play Review: Performance Meets Convenience
item.description: With great sound and versatility, this new speaker may be Sonos’ best.

item.title: Really, you made this without AI? Prove it
item.description: "This looks like AI." It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when online platforms refuse to label even obvious AI content. This leads me to one […]

item.title: After fighting malware for decades, this cybersecurity veteran is now hacking drones
item.description: Mikko Hyppönen is one of the most recognizable faces of the cybersecurity industry. After fighting computer viruses, worms, and malware, for more than 35 years, he tells TechCrunch why he is now working on systems to stop killer drones.

item.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill — release date, confirmed cast, and more about the Marvel TV Special on Disney+
item.description: The Punisher: One Last Kill will be the next Marvel Special Presentation to debut on Disney+ — here's what we know about it so far.

item.title: Chelsea vs Port Vale Free Streams: How to Watch FA Cup Quarter-Final 2025/26 Online From Anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Chelsea vs Port Vale in the FA Cup quarter-finals, with the home side looking to avoid a cup upset against the League One strugglers.

item.title: « Un grand écran tactile ne fonctionne pas dans une voiture », le créateur de l’iPhone a planché sur l’habitacle de la première Ferrari électrique
item.description: "C'est paresseux et dangereux." Jony Ive ne mâche pas ses mots sur la tendance des écrans géants dans l'automobile actuelle.

item.title: Reddit is closing down its unfiltered r/all page of trending posts, but there is still a way to access it if you know how
item.description: Reddit is now going to redirect you away from r/all, though you can still find it by loading up old Reddit.

item.title: Lenovo Legion Go Gen 2 : les prix s’envolent au-delà des 2 000 euros
item.description: Si vous lorgniez sur la Legion Go 2, c'est le mauvais moment de craquer. Aux États-Unis comme en France, les tarifs explosent. On parle de 1 999 $ chez Best Buy et jusqu'à 2 299 € sur le store officiel.

item.title: On a testé l’Origine Montmartre Air, l’un des vélos électriques urbains les plus légers du marché qui nous a bluffés par son autonomie
item.description: Sous la barre des 16 kg malgré son équipement, le Montmartre Air montre tout le savoir-faire français d'Origine avec un vélo électrique urbain agréable au quotidien, qui réduit la batterie mais pas l’autonomie. Nous l'avons testé, voici notre verdict.

item.title: Best Ski Clothes (2026): Patagonia, Arc’teryx, Burton, and More
item.description: From weatherproof jackets and pants to puffers, gloves, and socks, WIRED’s winter sports experts have you covered.

item.title: Super Meat Boy 3D makes suffering fun
item.description: The original Super Meat Boy is one of the best-known indie games of all time. Released in 2010, it's a brutally difficult 2D platformer, but so fun to play: The short levels almost feel like speedrunning puzzles, and even though they're filled with traps and buzzsaws, dying isn't so bad because you revive nearly instantly. […]

item.title: The app for tracking TV, movies, podcasts, and everything
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 122, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, go 'Zona, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about early Apple employees and weather apps and one-page productivity systems, watching […]

item.title: I hiked the highest peaks in Britain with a robotic exoskeleton to see if it could supercharge my mountain-climbing — here's what happened
item.description: There are 5 things I love about the Hypershell, and 3 I don’t.

item.title: Intelligence artificielle | Gare à l’IA-blanchiment
item.description: L’AI washing. C’est comme l’écoblanchiment, ou encore la récente vague d’« érablanchiment », où des fabricants prétendaient faussement vendre des produits fabriqués au Canada, mais appliqué à l’intelligence artificielle (IA). Et c’est un problème grandissant.

item.title: Wearables Are Getting Very Messy
item.description: Whoop, there it is. And by "it" we mean another lawsuit.

item.title: Cette trottinette électrique Navee à -43% concurrence sérieusement Xiaomi et Segway, avec supplément RGB pour le style
item.description: La Navee ST3 Pro est un modèle de trottinette électrique destiné aux trajets urbains quotidiens qui mise sur le confort et la fiabilité, à retrouver pour 449,98 euros chez Electro Depot ou 470,23 euros sur Amazon, au lieu de 799 euros.
